files.notes: This file contains two distinct sections: Notes from the Field (which includes various stake reports and memoriam notices) and Guide Lessons for January (which includes Lesson I on Theology/Spiritual Service and the beginning of Lesson III on Literature/John Greenleaf Whittier). The Guide Lessons section appears to be incomplete, cutting off mid-sentence in the Literature lesson foreword.
